title: ardisia subcrenulata
intro: Ardisia subcrenulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae, commonly known as the Ardisia plant or Coralberry, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ardisia subcrenulata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Ardisia subcrenulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being dried and used as a tincture or supplement, making it a versatile and sought-after medicinal plant.
